  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Arc-flash PPE clothing rating is below the required task category per label.",
    "Documentation of incident energy (ID) does not match the installed clothing rating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove affected personnel from the hazardous area until proper PPE is provided.",
    "Replace the underspecified clothing with arc-rated garments meeting or exceeding the label incident energy.",
    "Update documentation to reflect the correct PPE category and verify compliance with NFPA 70E tables."
  ],
  "rationale": "PPE selection for arc-flash protection must match the available incident energy on the equipment label. Using clothing with an arc rating below the task category exposes the worker to serious burn injury. This is a non-compliant, installed-defective condition that creates an imminent hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 70E Article 130.7(C)(15)",
    "OSHA 1910.132(d)(1)",
    "OSHA 1910.335(a)(1)(i)"
  ]
}
